content:
# Super Permeability

**Summary**: Zones of exceptionally high flow capacity within a reservoir.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-saraih|Saraih, 2024]] investigated how burrows create super-permeability zones in the Aruma Formation.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-saraih|Saraih, 2024]] Super-permeability is often associated with large, interconnected burrow systems.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-saraih|Saraih, 2024]] determined by production rates and petrophysical measurements.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- An illustrative case of such a super-k zone is observed in the stratigraphic interval of the Arab-D reservoir, yielding over 500 barrels per day per foot of thickness. ([[2024-saraih|Saraih, 2024, p. 36]])
